title: The Bride
overview: A Vietnamese–Thai wedding twisted into haunting and disturbing rituals.  Inspired by a real massacre within a mysterious Thai family, Cô Dâu Ma follows Yến as she becomes a bride in Thailand for the first time—only to uncover terrifying secrets and horrifying rites awaiting her.
